knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior_sections + active theory/iDo/weDo/youDo/selfCheck from packet.

exercises.code:
y, pred = [1, 0], [1, 1]
tp = sum(p == 1 and t == 1 for p, t in zip(pred, y))
fp = sum(p == 1 and t == 0 for p, t in zip(pred, y))
fn = sum(p == 0 and t == 1 for p, t in zip(pred, y))
print('tp', tp)
print('fp', fp)
print('fn', fn)

P, R = 0.5, 0.5
f1 = 2 * P * R / (P + R)
print('f1', f1)
print('P', P)
print('R', R)

n, pos = 10, 1
print('acc', (n - pos) / n)
print('prevalence', pos / n)
print('misleading', True)

labels = [1, 0, 1]
k = 3
print('p_at_k', sum(labels) / k)
print('k', k)
print('ok', True)

alerts, capacity = 50, 10
print('load', alerts / capacity)
print('alerts', alerts)
print('capacity', capacity)

print('recall_at_k', 2 / 4)
print('pos_topk', 2)
print('pos_total', 4)

n0, n1 = 9, 1
print('w1_over_w0', (1 / n1) / (1 / n0))
print('inside_cv', True)
print('ok', True)

print('resample_before_split', False)
print('policy', 'inside_train_fold')
print('ok', True)

y = [0, 0, 0, 1, 0]
print('minority', min(y.count(0), y.count(1)))
print('n1', y.count(1))
print('n0', y.count(0))

print('prevalence', 25 / 1000)
print('pos', 25)
print('n', 1000)

print('precision_depends_on_prevalence', True)
print('msg', 'recalibrate_expectations')
print('ok', True)

prev = 0.02
print('acc_all_neg', 1 - prev)
print('prevalence', prev)
print('useful', False)

print('brier', (1 - 1) ** 2)
print('n', 1)
print('ok', True)

ps, ys = [0.9, 0.6], [1, 1]
print('mean_p', sum(ps) / len(ps))
print('freq', sum(ys) / len(ys))
print('ok', True)

print('better', 0.1)
print('worse', 0.3)
print('ok', True)

print('fit_on', 'calib_holdout')
print('not_on_test', True)
print('ok', True)

raw, cal = [0.2, 0.5, 0.8], [0.17, 0.5, 0.83]
print(len(raw) == len(cal))
print('n', len(raw))
print('ok', True)

scores = [0.1, 0.4, 0.6, 0.9]
# need 2 in review: thr = 0.6 keeps 0.6,0.9
thr = 0.6
print('thr', thr)
print('n_review', sum(1 for s in scores if s >= thr))
print('ok', True)

print('cost', 3 * 2 + 1 * 10)
print('fp', 3)
print('fn', 1)

print('thr-v1', 0.7)
print('versioned', True)
print('ok', True)

scores = [0.4, 0.55, 0.65, 0.9]
print('n_0.5', sum(s >= 0.5 for s in scores))
print('n_0.6', sum(s >= 0.6 for s in scores))
print('ok', True)

print({'slice': 'LIM', 'precision': 0.7, 'n': 20})
